author: rachelknopfler
body: I've been the person checking your blog every day for the last 2 weeks like some kind of addict in desperate need of Burgo's music picks. You're one of the few people i trust when it comes to music, And Dave McMillan is no exception!.. He is GREAT. Morning After is my favorite. Thanks guys.

author: Matt Burgess
body:
Rachel, I can't thank you enough for your kind words… especially considering I haven't been posting all that much lately!  
So glad to hear you like Dave's stuff… I know it's been on constant rotation for me lately too :)

author: rachelknopfler
body:
Burgo! Thanks for your reply. I found a couple of things recently that reminded me of you..so here it goes.. hope you like. :)

1.Thomas Dybdahl (from norway, he's great )  
[http://www.myspace.com/tdybdahl](http://www.myspace.com/tdybdahl)

2\. Stornoway- “Zorbing” Music Video (thought the video was cool.)  
[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GiLO4qPkA64](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GiLO4qPkA64)

3\. Dawes- “Love is all I am” (amazing lyrics)  
[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kgYxzBVDW\_4](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kgYxzBVDW_4)
